claims.claim: `resonance_stability_context_v1` should preserve a specific low-comfort/high-foothold habitability state rather than flattening it to a generic thin status.
Non-finite comfort gate or fluctuation inputs should remain visible as upstream data-quality evidence instead of being masked as ordinary comfort-gate-only context.
Semantic permeability and structural plurality interactions should remain read-only schema diagnostics unless a later approved live pressure/fill/control route is explicitly requested.
